facts: Stripe specialist support previously confirmed that https://vl.badjoke-lab.com/ was supportable as the ViewLoom business website.
The prior instruction was to update the Stripe account business website from the old Livefield URL to the ViewLoom URL before using the existing Payment Link on ViewLoom.
The prior wording direction was to use Support or Support ViewLoom rather than characterize the flow as a charitable donation.
The prior project record required a Japanese commercial disclosure surface for the support flow.
limitations: This historical correspondence does not prove the current Stripe Dashboard website value.
This historical correspondence does not prove that account approval, Payment Link settings, or refund configuration are unchanged today.
